title: Eureka! (Unofficial Port)
description: An unofficial NeoForge port of Eureka! Ships to Minecraft 1.21.1.
body:
# Eureka! Ships (Unofficial NeoForge Port)

⚠️ **IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER**
This is an **UNOFFICIAL** port of Eureka! Ships to Minecraft 1.21.1 using the NeoForge loader. 
* Do **NOT** report any bugs or issues found in this version to the official developers.
* For support, bug reports, or questions regarding this 1.21.1 version, please contact the port author directly.

---

## 🧭 About the Port
Eureka is the primary addon for Valkyrien Skies 2 that allows you to turn any block structure into a fully functional, physics-based airship or ocean vessel. This build officially brings Eureka to the 1.21.1 NeoForge ecosystem.

## 🛠️ Required Dependencies
To make this mod work, you **MUST** install the following mods in your folder:
1. **Valkyrien Skies (Unofficial NeoForge Port)** — The physics core (Use my 1.21.1 build!)
2. **Kotlin For Forge** (For 1.21.1 NeoForge)
3. **Architectury API** (For 1.21.1 NeoForge)

---

## 📜 Credits & License
* **Original Creators:** Huge thanks to the Valkyrien Skies team for developing this amazing ship mod.
* **Original Source Code:** [Valkyrien Skies GitHub](https://github.com/ValkyrienSkies/Valkyrien-Skies-2)
* **License:** Distributed under the **MIT License**, perfectly matching the original mod's terms.
